item.title: 罗里·约翰斯顿：油价如何可能飙升至每桶200美元以上
item.description:
所有石油危机之母。

【原文：

The mother of all oil shocks.

】

item.title: 零散股：油价如何飙升至每桶200美元以上（播客）
item.description: 零散股：油价如何飙升至每桶200美元以上（播客）【原文：Odd Lots: How Oil Could Surge to Over $200 a Barrel (Podcast)】

item.title: 乐高将在美国扩大业务，强劲消费抵消伊朗战争风险
item.description: 乐高集团（Lego A/S）以生产可拼接塑料积木玩具闻名，该公司计划在美国进行大规模投资，并未因伊朗战争带来的政治风险而却步。【原文：Lego A/S, best known for toys using interlocking plastic bricks, plans to invest heavily in the US, undeterred by the political risks from the Iran war.】

item.title: 欧洲国防开支激增，瑞士武器出口量大幅攀升
item.description: 随着欧洲国防开支激增，瑞士去年对海外武器出口量逼近历史最高水平，该国军工行业由此迎来复苏。此前因瑞士严格的出口管制，该行业曾面临消亡危机。【原文：Swiss arms shipments abroad neared an all-time high last year as European defense spending boomed, in a rebound for an industry that feared extinction over the country’s strict export rules.】

item.title: 印度优先保障家庭用气，将液化石油气从炼油厂调配至居民家庭
item.description: 印度已援引紧急权力，将液化石油气供应从工业用户转向家庭用户，以保护普通民众免受中东战争的影响。【原文：India has invoked emergency powers to redirect supplies of liquefied petroleum gas away from industrial users to households, as it seeks to shield ordinary people from the impact of the Middle East war.】

item.title: 香料航空董事长称原油价格即使维持在90美元也"不可持续"
item.description: 印度廉价航空公司SpiceJet董事长警告称，随着原油价格维持在不可持续的水平——即使每桶90美元——印度航空公司可能需要重新考虑扩张计划。【原文：Indian airlines may need to rethink expansion plans as crude oil prices hover at unsustainable levels, even at $90 a barrel, budget carrier SpiceJet Ltd.’s chairman warned.】

item.title: 海湾石油巨头深化减产力度，油轮避开霍尔木兹海峡
item.description: 中东地区减产力度不断加大，关键的霍尔木兹海峡航道仍处于近乎停滞状态，能源市场的混乱局面持续扩大。【原文：Oil production cuts in the Middle East are deepening as the crucial Strait of Hormuz waterway remains at a near-standstill, widening the chaos in energy markets.】

item.title: 台湾、韩国投资者在抛售潮中坚守杠杆押注
item.description: 在伊朗战争引发的抛售潮中，台湾和韩国的散户投资者大多维持了杠杆仓位，这表明亚洲两大科技股占比较高的市场仍具有强劲的投资需求。【原文：Retail investors in Taiwan and South Korea largely held on to their leveraged positions during a selloff spurred by the war in Iran, signaling resilient appetite for two of Asia’s tech-heavy markets.】

item.title: 埃及通胀在伊朗战争爆发前一个月加速
item.description: 埃及二月份通胀加速，随着伊朗战争的连锁反应给这个依赖进口的经济体带来压力，这种情况可能进一步恶化。【原文：Egyptian inflation quickened in February, a situation that may be poised to worsen as the knock-on effects from the Iran war pile pressure on the import-reliant economy.】

item.title: 欧洲天然气价格下跌，特朗普正努力稳定能源市场
item.description: 欧洲天然气价格下跌，此前美国总统唐纳德·特朗普预测伊朗战争即将结束。随着这场冲突颠覆能源市场，特朗普正面临日益增大的压力。【原文：European natural gas dropped after US President Donald Trump predicted the Iran war will end soon, as he faces mounting pressure over how the conflict has upended energy markets.】

item.title: 关注伊朗战争的最新动态与深度分析
item.description: 3月9日，以色列袭击贝鲁特后，浓烟升腾。摄影师：Daniel Carde/Getty Images【原文：Smoke rises after an Israeli attack in Beirut on March 9. Photographer: Daniel Carde/Getty Images】

item.title: 橡树资本旗下数据中心公司计划借人工智能热潮将容量扩大三倍
item.description: 由橡树资本管理公司支持的英国企业Pure Data Centres正寻求与全球多家大型科技公司及其他企业合作，共同建设人工智能数据中心，目标是将其容量扩大三倍。【原文：Pure Data Centres, a UK firm backed by Oaktree Capital Management, is seeking to partner with some of the world’s largest technology firms and others to build artificial intelligence data centers, with the goal of tripling its capacity.】

item.title: 对冲成本飙升凸显印度股市忧虑加剧
item.description: 在印度股市经历多年由国内流动性推动的平静期后，投资者正为防范市场动荡支付自2024年7月以来的最高成本。【原文：Investors are paying the most since July 2024 to protect against turbulence in Indian shares after years of domestic liquidity-fueled calm.】

item.title: 里拉避险成本触及8个月高点：土耳其内部观察
item.description: 期权交易显示，尽管美国总统特朗普暗示与伊朗的战争可能很快结束，但交易员们仍不愿削减对里拉的看跌押注。【原文：Options show that traders aren’t ready to prune back bearish bets against the lira even as US President Trump signaled the war with Iran could end soon.】

item.title: 富时100指数有望上涨，因油价回落
南非以担保基金为后盾推动基础设施合作项目
item.description: 南非计划快速扩大一项新的信贷担保机制，以支持数十亿美元的基础设施项目，涵盖电网扩建、供水系统、港口建设及货运铁路等领域。【原文：South Africa plans to rapidly expand a new credit-guarantee vehicle to support billions of dollars in infrastructure projects, from power-grid expansion and water systems to ports and freight rail.】

item.title: 奥迪挑战英国终身禁赛令，力图挽救声誉
item.description: 前对冲基金大亨克里斯平·奥迪因性骚扰指控导致公司崩盘后，试图挽回声誉的努力本周将进入伦敦法庭审理阶段。此案将成为英国监管机构打击金融城非金融不当行为举措的重要考验。【原文：Former hedge fund boss Crispin Odey’s attempt to salvage his reputation after a series of sexual misconduct allegations that cratered his firm will end up in a London court this week, in a major test of the UK watchdog’s move to tackle non-financial wrongdoing in the City.】

item.title: 台积电销售额增长30%，得益于全球对人工智能硬件的持续需求
item.description: 台湾积体电路制造股份有限公司今年前两个月的销售额增长30%，得益于中东冲突爆发前人工智能基础设施建设的强劲势头。【原文：Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s sales rose 30% in the first two months of the year, buoyed by the robust pace of AI infrastructure construction prior to the outbreak of conflict in the Middle East.】

item.title: 泰国要求政府机构居家办公以节约燃油
item.description: 泰国政府将要求大多数政府机构立即全面实施居家办公安排，作为其抑制能源需求的紧急措施之一。【原文：The Thai government will require most government agencies to adopt full work-from-home arrangements starting immediately as part of its emergency measures to curb energy demand.】

item.title: 亚洲买家苦寻三月液化天然气，供应持续紧张
item.description: 卡塔尔全球最大液化天然气出口设施因战事中断运营，导致全球超低温燃料供应趋紧，部分亚洲买家正努力寻找现货货源。【原文：Some Asian LNG buyers are struggling to find prompt cargoes after a war-related outage at the world’s largest export facility in Qatar tightened global supplies of the super-chilled fuel.】

item.title: 据称，Quest Global已邀请多家银行为其10亿美元的首次公开募股（IPO）进行推介。
item.description: 据知情人士透露，由凯雷集团支持的Quest Global Services Pte公司已开始与投资银行进行磋商，计划在孟买进行首次公开募股，预计融资规模可能高达10亿美元。【原文：Carlyle Group Inc.-backed Quest Global Services Pte has begun discussions with investment banks for a potential initial public offering in Mumbai that could raise as much as $1 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 杨立昆新创人工智能公司获10亿美元种子轮融资
item.description: 人工智能领域的先驱人物杨立昆为一家初创企业筹集了10.3亿美元资金，该公司承诺研发出比ChatGPT等现有人工智能产品更擅长应对现实世界挑战的技术。【原文：Yann LeCun, a pioneer in the field of artificial intelligence, has raised $1.03 billion for a nascent startup that promises to invent technology more capable of navigating the real world than existing AI products like ChatGPT.】

item.title: 伊朗冲击颠覆房地产市场期待已久的复苏态势
item.description: 俄罗斯入侵乌克兰导致房地产十年狂欢戛然而止五年后，南面约1600英里处爆发的另一场战争，如今正威胁着扼杀投资者自那以来一直期待的复苏。【原文：Five years after Russia’s invasion of Ukraine brought real estate’s decade-long party to a sudden halt, another war about 1,600 miles south is now threatening to choke off the recovery investors have been anticipating ever since.】

item.title: “彻底恐慌”：原油市场周一狂飙，交易员承受极限考验
item.description: 即便以全球油市过山车般的波动标准来看，周一的剧烈震荡也考验着交易员的极限。【原文：Even by the roller-coaster standards of the global oil market, Monday’s extreme swings tested traders’ limits.】

item.title: 特朗普暗示可能结束伊朗战争，农产品价格转跌
item.description: 随着美国总统特朗普的言论缓解了人们对中东战争将长期持续的担忧，农产品价格随原油价格一同下跌。【原文：Crop prices fell alongside a slump in crude oil, after comments from US President Donald Trump eased concerns the war in the Middle East would be long-lasting.】

item.title: 中国Z世代日内交易者信赖聊天机器人并推动市场波动
item.description:
这一群体已成为世界第二大经济体中投资增长日益重要的驱动力。

【原文：

This cohort has become an increasingly important driver of investment growth in the world’s second-largest economy.

】

item.title: 足够多冷静的头脑正在从悬崖边缘退却
item.description:
市场波动主要受情绪驱动，亚洲和欧洲地区受影响最为显著。【原文：

Sentiment is driving the market gyrations, with Asia and Europe most exposed.

】

item.title: 人民币汇率走强，因央行将汇率中间价上调幅度扩大至1月以来最大
item.description: 在岸人民币汇率上涨，此前中国人民银行将该管理型货币的每日参考汇率上调幅度创2025年1月以来新高。【原文：The onshore yuan rose after the People’s Bank of China strengthened the daily reference rate for the managed currency by the most since January 2025.】

item.title: 庞大船队集结与疾驰油轮指向霍尔木兹海峡交通堵塞
item.description: 霍尔木兹海峡附近已出现至少十余个船只集群，这很可能是该水道周边电子干扰加剧的迹象——该水道是美以两国对伊朗战争的核心战略要冲。【原文：At least a dozen clusters of ships have appeared near the Strait of Hormuz, a likely sign of elevated electronic interference around the waterway that’s central to the US and Israeli war against Iran.】

item.title: 中国增加原油进口以防范供应中断
item.description: 今年前两个月，中国原油进口量有所增加，该国持续囤积石油以防范供应中断风险。【原文：China purchased more crude in the first two months of the year as the country continued to hoard oil to guard against supply disruptions.】
